abandonConfirm.title: Abandon this task?
abandonConfirm.message: No guilt — it just won’t count toward your honey.

finish.rangeA11yLearning: Honest finish range {{low}} to {{high}}, still learning.

ring.a11y_one: Timer running. Honest target about {{count}} minute. Elapsed time is shown in the center.
ring.a11y_other: Timer running. Honest target about {{count}} minutes. Elapsed time is shown in the center.

guardrail.heading: Still on this?
guardrail.body_one: You’ve been on “{{taskLabel}}” for {{count}} minute. Still the right thing, or want to surface?
guardrail.body_other: You’ve been on “{{taskLabel}}” for {{count}} minutes. Still the right thing, or want to surface?

pace.over: +{{count}} over your guess — that's ok, now we know
pace.closing: Closing in on your guess… that’s fine
